description: Use this API to delete the specified two-terminal dc line from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = purg2dc(dc)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line to be removed; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
